ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the application was submitted */,
  "app_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "app_location" TEXT /* Location of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proposed development */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of application */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Current decision on the application */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Spatial information about the application location */,
  "fees_paid" TEXT /* Application fees paid */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Applicant's name */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Applicant's email */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the application */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the application was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the application */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES application_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES application_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_decision FOREIGN KEY ("decision") REFERENCES application_decisions ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES application_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year in which applications were submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the application type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application status */,
  "sort_order" INTEGER /* Display order of the status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Is the status a final decision? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* ID of the application the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., plans, additional information) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "doc_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, JPEG) */,
  "doc_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* ID of the application the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, clarification, decision) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Is the comment resolved? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_comments_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* ID of the application that changed status */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who changed the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES application_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, decision-maker) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* ID of the application that was decided on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the decision */,
  "decision_text" TEXT /* Text of the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_decisions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_decisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
